description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is clad in dark panels, contrasted by large floor-to-ceiling windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. A prominent upper-level terrace is adorned with planter boxes, providing a green outdoor area. The ground floor includes a spacious open area with folding glass doors that open to the outside, suggesting a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience. The house is elevated on stilts at one end, creating a unique visual profile and possibly accommodating uneven terrain. Surrounding the base is a border of low greenery, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, box-shaped house with large windows, a flat roof, and an upper terrace with planter boxes. The exterior is dark-paneled, elevated on stilts, and surrounded by greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass windows, open folding doors, and the upper terrace with planter boxes.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by a solid dark wall with minimal windows and a visible green border at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the extensive window arrangement, the terrace, and the house's boxy structure.
description_view_3: Top-down view of the terrace with planter boxes and a glimpse into the interior bedroom through open doors.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features folding glass doors with no visible steps or porch, emphasizing a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor spaces.
